arts.ttl: Milutin Osmajic charged with BITING after appearing to sink his teeth into Liverpool loanee Owen Beck during Preston's derby draw with Blackburn
arts.sum: Osmajic has been charged with biting an opponent during last Sunday's goalless draw with Blackburn in the EFL Championship.

arts.ttl: Preston player charged for alleged bite on neck
arts.sum: The English Football Association has charged Preston forward Milutin Osmajic with violent conduct after he allegedly bit Blackburn defender Owen Beck.

arts.ttl: Preston striker Milutin Osmajic charged by The FA with biting an opponent
arts.sum: The Montenegro international is alleged to have bitten Liverpool loanee Owen Beck during Sunday's goalless draw at Deepdale

arts.ttl: Preston striker Milutin Osmajic charged with biting opponent after incident in Blackburn draw
arts.sum: Osmajic clashed with Blackburn’s Owen Beck, who was sent off for kicking out at North End’s Duane Holmes in the same incident
